title: Multi-Stage Attack (Full Kill Chain)
story: Multiple security alerts have fired across several systems over a 2-hour period.
The web application team reported unusual database query patterns.
The database team noticed high load during off-hours.
Network monitoring detected large outbound transfers to an external IP.
This appears to be a coordinated multi-stage attack. Reconstruct the full
kill chain from initial access through exfiltration.

objectives.label: What was the initial attack vector?
What IP was data exfiltrated to?

hints: Web attacks: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case10_stream_http | stats count by uri | sort -count
Network: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case10_firewall | stats sum(bytes) by dest_ip | sort -sum
IDS alerts: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case10_suricata | table signature src_ip dest_ip
splunk_queries: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case10_stream_http | stats count by uri | sort -count
index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case10_suricata | table _time src_ip dest_ip signature
index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case10_firewall | stats sum(bytes) by src_ip, dest_ip | sort -sum(bytes)
